query: I have this spec at `evals/fixtures/anyof-parameter-variants.yaml`. What Drift tests should I write for the `/v2/images/{image_id}` endpoint?
expected_behavior: Triggers the openapi-parser skill (not the drift skill) to handle spec analysis
Produces an analysis section that identifies the anyOf on image_id as producing 2 parameter-type variants (integer and string) plus a 404 negative test — 3 tests total
Generates a Drift operations YAML block with exactly two 200-path tests: one using an integer image_id (e.g. getImage_byId) and one using a string image_id (e.g. getImage_bySlug)
Generates a third test for the 404 case using a guaranteed non-existent ID
Uses dataset expressions (e.g. ${image-data:images.existing.id}) rather than hardcoded literals for path parameters
Includes a dataset YAML block or notes that one is needed to hold the integer and string ID fixtures
